title: The weekly BHA reset.
body: Clay mask, 2% BHA dwell, barrier seal. Resets without retinoid stacking.

steps.title: Kaolin clay mask
steps.sub: 10 minutes, do not let dry fully
steps.body: A 10-minute clay mask draws sebum and surface debris without the over-drying that comes from leaving it on until cracking. Apply to clean, slightly damp skin. The mask should still feel cool when you remove it.

steps.title: BHA 2% leave-on
steps.body: After the clay mask is removed, apply a thin layer of 2% salicylic acid to dry skin. Allow it to dwell for 15 minutes — this is the active step that delivers the actual exfoliation. Do not stack with retinoids on the same night.

steps.title: Barrier seal moisturiser
steps.body: After the BHA dwell, apply a thicker-than-usual layer of ceramide moisturiser. The night of the reset is not the night to add anything else — no retinoid, no acid serum, no fragrance. The point is recovery as much as exfoliation.
